---
title: "EDA"
---

# Librerías

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from vega_datasets import data
import altair as alt
```

# Cargar DS

```{python}
movies_extended = data.movies()
movies_extended.head()
```

# Tipo de datos del DS

```{python}
movies_extended.info()
```

# Valores faltantes

```{python}
nan_percent = movies_extended.isna().mean()*100
nan_percent_sorted = nan_percent.sort_values(ascending=False).round(2)
nan_percent_sorted
```

## Melt del DS

```{python}
movies_nans = movies_extended.isna().reset_index().melt(
    id_vars='index',
    var_name='column',
    value_name ='NaN'
)
movies_nans
```

## Eliminar restricción en Altair

```{python}
alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()
```

## Visualización de datos faltantes

```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_nans).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('index:O'),
    alt.Y('column'),
    alt.Color('NaN:N'),
    alt.Stroke('NaN:N')
).properties(
    width=800
)
```

## Limite para datos faltantes

```{python}
threshold_nan = 70

cols_to_drop = nan_percent[nan_percent>threshold_nan].index
print(cols_to_drop)

movies_cleaned = movies_extended.drop(columns=cols_to_drop)
```

## Estadísticos de pandas

```{python}
movies_cleaned.describe()
```

## Distribución para todas las variables numéricas

```{python}

numerical_columns = movies_cleaned.select_dtypes('number').columns.tolist()

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat(), type='quantitative',bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y('count()')
).properties(
    width=200,
    height=200
).repeat(
    numerical_columns,
    columns=3
)

```

## Gráfico de dispersión por todas las variables

```{python}
numerical_filtered = [
    'IMDB_Rating',
    'Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating',
    'US_Gross',
    'Production_Budget'
]

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered, 
)

```

## Heatmap de todas las variables

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Color('count()')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered, 
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent'
)

```

# Correlación de Pearson

```{python}
corr_matrix = movies_cleaned[numerical_columns].corr(method='pearson')
corr_matrix
```

## Melt de la matrix de correlación

```{python}
corr_df = corr_matrix.reset_index().melt(id_vars='index')
corr_df.columns = ['Variable1','Variable2','Correlation']
corr_df
```

## Matriz de Pearson

```{python}

corr_df = corr_df[corr_df['Variable1']<=corr_df['Variable2']]


heatmap_corr = alt.Chart(corr_df).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('Variable1'),
    alt.Y('Variable2'),
    alt.Color('Correlation', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[-1,1], scheme='redblue')),
    tooltip=[
        'Variable1',
        'Variable2',
        'Correlation'
    ]
).properties(
    width=300,
    height=300,
    title='Matriz de Correlación de Pearson'
)

text_corr = heatmap_corr.mark_text().encode(
    alt.Text('Correlation', format='.2f'),
    color = alt.condition(
        'abs(datum.Correlation) > 0.5',
        alt.value('white'),
        alt.value('black')
    )
)


(heatmap_corr + text_corr).configure_view(
    strokeWidth=0
)
```

## Cruce de columnas categóricas y numéricas

```{python}
categorical_columns = movies_cleaned.select_dtypes('object').columns.tolist()

categorical_to_remove = ['Title','Release_Date', 'Distributor','Director','Source']

categorical_filtered = [col for col in categorical_columns if col not in categorical_to_remove]

categorical_filtered


alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='nominal'),
    alt.Size('count()')
).properties(
    width=200,
    height=200
).repeat(
    column=numerical_columns,
    row=categorical_filtered
)
```

## Describir variables categóricas

```{python}
movies_cleaned.describe(exclude='number')
```

## Gráfico de cada categoría

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat(), type='nominal', sort='-x')
).repeat(
    categorical_filtered
)
```

## Gráfico del cruce de cada categoría

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'),type='nominal', sort='-size'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'),type='nominal', sort='size'),
    alt.Size('count()'),
    alt.Color('count()')
).repeat(
    column=categorical_filtered,
    row=categorical_filtered
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent',
    size='independent'
)
```

## Gráfico con facetas y repeat

```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X('Running_Time_min', type='quantitative'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='nominal'),
    alt.Size('count()')
).facet(
    column='MPAA_Rating'
).repeat(
    row=categorical_filtered
)

```
